subcodes.title: Words to a Rabbi, spoken on 1912-12-04
subcodes.first_line: What is intended by the creation of heaven and earth in six days is a spiritual creation and a divine day
subcodes.first_line_orig: مراد از خلق آسمانها و زمینها در شش روز آن روز الهی است و خلق روحانی
subcodes.subjects: @multiple meanings; interpretations in scripture, @human reality created in the image of God, @creation of the world, @symbolism, @transcendence; unknowability of God
